description: This file contains SCSS mixins for generating grid systems, including flexbox and CSS grid layouts, with support for responsive breakpoints, gutters, offsets, and column configurations. It is used to generate CSS classes for grid layouts in a Bootstrap-like framework.
external_files: variables or mixins like variable-exists, breakpoint-infix, media-breakpoint-up, map-keys, divide, percentage

methods.name: make-row
methods.description: Creates a flex container with wrapping and gutter spacing for grid rows.

methods.name: make-col-ready
methods.description: Prepares columns with default sizing and spacing, ensuring they are ready for responsive adjustments.

methods.name: make-col
methods.description: Defines column width and flex properties based on size and total columns.

methods.name: make-col-auto
methods.description: Sets a column to auto width.

methods.name: make-col-offset
methods.description: Offsets a column by a specified number of columns.

methods.name: row-cols
methods.description: Creates a row with a specified number of equal-width columns.

methods.name: make-grid-columns
methods.description: Generates grid column classes for different breakpoints and column counts.

methods.name: make-cssgrid
methods.description: Generates CSS grid column classes for different breakpoints and column spans.
